status: DEV — clinician_review pending; NOT patient-facing; reference-only (engine-isolated). TGA pregnancy category per drug/class. Reserved pharm-check pregnancy_check NOT wired (reference-only). Carries NO dose. Records author to review_status 'draft'; require clinician verification.

attestation.statement: Clinician-attested via signed per-record sign-off worksheet (Kenneth Lee, MED0001857758, 2026-07-14). CLINICAL sign-off only; regulatory NOT given; -dev/non-patient-facing.

records.subject: isotretinoin
records.guidance: potent teratogen; pregnancy prevention program with effective contraception mandatory

provenance.source: TGA Prescribing Medicines in Pregnancy (facts, cited)

records.subject: acitretin
records.guidance: teratogen; pregnancy must be avoided for a prolonged period after cessation

provenance.source: TGA Prescribing Medicines in Pregnancy (facts, cited)
TGA Prescribing Medicines in Pregnancy (facts, cited)

records.subject: misoprostol
records.guidance: abortifacient; contraindicated in pregnancy outside sanctioned obstetric use

provenance.source: TGA Prescribing Medicines in Pregnancy (facts, cited)

records.subject: warfarin
records.guidance: embryopathy and fetal haemorrhage; avoid — recognised exception is selected mechanical-heart-valve patients under specialist care

provenance.source: TGA Prescribing Medicines in Pregnancy (facts, cited)

records.subject: sodium valproate
records.guidance: high teratogenic and neurodevelopmental risk; avoid in women of childbearing potential unless no effective alternative, under specialist care

provenance.source: TGA Prescribing Medicines in Pregnancy (facts, cited)

records.subject: carbamazepine
records.guidance: neural tube and other malformation risk

provenance.source: TGA Prescribing Medicines in Pregnancy (facts, cited)
TGA Prescribing Medicines in Pregnancy (facts, cited)

records.subject: lithium
records.guidance: cardiac malformation (Ebstein anomaly) risk first trimester; specialist management

provenance.source: TGA Prescribing Medicines in Pregnancy (facts, cited)

records.subject: methotrexate
records.guidance: abortifacient and teratogen; contraindicated for non-oncological use in pregnancy

provenance.source: TGA Prescribing Medicines in Pregnancy (facts, cited)

records.subject: ACE inhibitors
records.guidance: fetal renal toxicity, oligohydramnios, skull hypoplasia; avoid throughout pregnancy

provenance.source: TGA Prescribing Medicines in Pregnancy (facts, cited)

records.subject: angiotensin receptor blockers
records.guidance: same fetotoxicity as ACE inhibitors; avoid throughout pregnancy

provenance.source: TGA Prescribing Medicines in Pregnancy (facts, cited)
TGA Prescribing Medicines in Pregnancy (facts, cited)

records.subject: tetracyclines
records.guidance: fetal dental staining and effects on bone; avoid from the second trimester

provenance.source: TGA Prescribing Medicines in Pregnancy (facts, cited)

records.subject: doxycycline
records.guidance: tetracycline-class effects on fetal teeth and bone

provenance.source: TGA Prescribing Medicines in Pregnancy (facts, cited)
TGA Prescribing Medicines in Pregnancy (facts, cited)
TGA Prescribing Medicines in Pregnancy (facts, cited)

records.subject: folic acid
records.guidance: recommended periconceptionally to reduce neural tube defect risk

provenance.source: TGA Prescribing Medicines in Pregnancy (facts, cited)
